creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
welcome to a world where hospitality meets artistry & every experience is designed to be savoured @andazmacau @galaxymacau ✨🏩🍹🥘💎💖✨

📍 Upon entering the Andaz Macau, guests are greeted by a magnificent lobby that showcases a blend of modern elegance and traditional Macanese & stunning lobby steps serve as a focal point & art pieces that reflect the rich cultural heritage of Macau

📍Andaz Kitchen is vibrant & welcoming offers a delightful taste of Macau’s culinary influences, particularly its Portuguese heritage 

📍 Blossom Palace 花悅庭 at Galaxy Macau elevates the dining experience serving authentic Beijing and Huaiyang cuisines while embracing innovation while renowned for their must-try Peking duck

📍 Galaxy Macau Tam Chai Yu Chun 氹仔漁村 offers a menu filled with comforting dishes & traditional Cantonese flavours, is popular for its fisherman style seafood  make it a favorite spot for both locals a satisfying meal

📍 Diamond show is a dazzling show of lights, sound, water & visual artistry in the Diamond Lobby the magnificent giant diamond miraculously emerges from the water & rotates before your eyes, before being engulfed by the fountain, bringing good fortune to all

#GalaxyMacau 
#AndazMacau
#AndazKitchen
#BlossomPalaces
#TamChaiYuChun

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #luxuryhotel #marcauhotel

transcription.text: Your love for comfort has watched the city's gates turn to dust Filming helicopters crashing in the ocean from way above Got the music in you, baby, tell me why Got the music in you, baby, tell me why You've been locked in there forever and you just can't say goodbye Kisses on the foreheads if the love is wrapped in yours
